settings.title: Great companies are made by great people

settings.editor: Designers waste countless hours organizing, finding, approving, and sharing content — this mindless work gets in the way of the creative process.

settings.title: We’ve been helping websites thrive for the last 10 years.
We're a team of over 70 people working for better service.
A multiple that suggests double revenue.

settings.editor:
Our platform is designed with user experience in mind, making it simple and intuitive for both your team and your customers to use.

Our goal is to change the way that people succeed online, and we’re starting with how they achieve growth through their websites. But, for us, it doesn’t stop there.

We grow through our own website. And even our internal culture encourages people to grow their careers by taking on new challenges.
You tell Simplly what's important to you and it flags the important insights from everywhere, including news sites, blogs, and newsletters

settings.ma_el_team_member_description: Clinton mainly focuses on the company strategy, product vision, and special growth projects for Simplly to enable a brighter future for customers and employees alike.
